meta.title: INCONTROLLER
meta.description: Nathan Brubaker & Keith Lunden from Mandiant provided their analysis of the INCONTROLLER (aka PIPEDREAM) malware that was revealed right before S4x22 in April, from the S4x23 Main Stage.
